title: agropyron ramosum
intro: Agropyron ramosum, also known as Elymus cinerea, is a type of plant species belonging to the grass family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Agropyron ramosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Agropyron ramosum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to be used for its medicinal and health benefits.
